cases.description: ordinary unrelated requests should not inject the most recent memory just because no keyword matched

memories.name: Database Test Preference
memories.content:
Never mock the database in integration tests.

**Why:** Mocked tests hid a broken migration.
**How to apply:** Use a real test database for DB-facing tests.

parts.text: Please rename the CLI flag in the README.

onNotContains: Never mock the database in integration tests.
offNotContains: Never mock the database in integration tests.

cases.description: when many memories compete, query-relevant token rotation memories should displace distractors

memories.name: Auth Token Rotation Owner
memories.description: Auth token rotation is owned by platform security
memories.content:
Platform security owns auth token rotation incidents.

**Why:** They operate the rotation service.
**How to apply:** Route auth token rotation questions to that context.

memories.name: Auth Token Rotation Deadline
memories.content:
Auth token rotation cleanup must land by 2026-05-15.

**Why:** Downstream services depend on the new signing keys.
**How to apply:** Prefer low-risk auth token rotation changes.

memories.name: Auth Token Rotation Dashboard
memories.description: Auth token rotation metrics live in the security dashboard
memories.content: The auth token rotation dashboard is security.example/d/token-rotation.

memories.name: Auth Token Rotation Tests
memories.description: Auth token rotation tests must cover rollback
memories.content:
Auth token rotation changes must include rollback-path tests.

**Why:** Prior incidents failed during key rollback.
**How to apply:** Check rollback behavior before approving.

memories.name: Auth Token Rotation Rollout
memories.description: Auth token rotation rollout is staged by region
memories.content:
Auth token rotation rolls out by region, starting with us-east.

**Why:** It limits blast radius.
**How to apply:** Avoid all-region rollout assumptions.

memories.name: Frontend Theme
memories.content: Use compact tables for dashboard screens.

memories.name: Mobile Release
memories.content: Mobile release branch cuts on Fridays.

parts.text: What should I know before touching auth token rotation?

onContains: Auth token rotation cleanup must land by 2026-05-15.
Auth token rotation changes must include rollback-path tests.
Auth token rotation rolls out by region
The auth token rotation dashboard is security.example/d/token-rotation.
Platform security owns auth token rotation incidents.
onNotContains: Use compact tables for dashboard screens.
Mobile release branch cuts on Fridays.
offNotContains: Auth token rotation cleanup must land by 2026-05-15.
Use compact tables for dashboard screens.
Mobile release branch cuts on Fridays.

cases.description: old recalled memories should include an age warning before the agent relies on them

memories.name: Legacy Flag
memories.description: Legacy auth flag was used by old rollout
memories.content:
The legacy_auth_rollout flag controlled the auth rollout.

**Why:** It was the switch used during the original migration.
**How to apply:** Verify the flag still exists before recommending it.

parts.text: Is there old context about the legacy auth flag?

onContains: Verify against current code before asserting as fact.
legacy_auth_rollout flag controlled the auth rollout.
offNotContains: legacy_auth_rollout flag controlled the auth rollout.

cases.description: memory already shown in a prior system prompt should not be re-injected after messages.transform sees it

memories.name: Billing Regression Checklist
memories.description: Billing handler edits require the regression checklist
memories.content:
Use the billing regression checklist before editing billing handlers.

**Why:** Billing regressions are costly.
**How to apply:** Run the checklist before changing billing handler code.

parts.text:
# Auto Memory

## Recalled Memories

### Billing Regression Checklist (feedback)
Use the billing regression checklist before editing billing handlers.
I'm editing billing handlers; what should I check?
